executive_progress.current_priority: Keep 017 apply-runner and rehearsal work closed until explicit Bastian + ChatGPT authorization exists.

active_product_state.control_gestion: KPIONE identity, grain and idempotency contract selected; no productive apply or source cutover is authorized.
active_product_state.legacy_kpione_state: Evidence of previous runtime, not migration authority for the new architecture.

selected_contract.identity_authority: source_file_sha256 + sheet + source_row_number for source rows; event_id with stability checks for business events
selected_contract.idempotency_authority: content-addressed source versions with explicit supersession for corrections and inactive isolation for failed runs

active_risks.risk: 017 treated as implicitly authorized by the 016B contract selection.
A future runner treats filename, latest download, or legacy table state as identity authority.
active_risks.control: The selected contract makes source_file_sha256, sheet, row provenance, event stability checks, and declared supersession the authority.

active_risks.risk: Correction handling mutates or deletes immutable source evidence.
active_risks.control: Corrections use source version supersession and active-projection tombstones; immutable staging rows remain evidence.

active_risks.risk: Productive actions inferred from repo-only R2 architecture work.
active_risks.control: All DB, SQL, apply, cutover, app, loader, productive-contract, and destructive flags remain false.

next_actions: Request explicit Bastian + ChatGPT authorization before any 017 apply-runner or rehearsal work.
Keep productive gates closed until R3/R4 authorization exists.
